top_signals.title: CISA orders feds to patch max severity ColdFusion flaw by Friday
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered government agencies to patch an actively exploited maximum-severity flaw in the Adobe ColdFusion commercial web app development platform by Friday. [...]
